title: STMZ Kinetic
abstract:
Hi everyone! I'm building | STMZ Kinetic (https://stmzkinetic.com), an AI-powered social media workspace for planning, creating, scheduling, and managing content from one place.

I'd really appreciate honest feedback from founders and builders. I'm especially interested in:
abstract_zh: 嘿大家好！我打造了 STMZ 动感 workspace（https://stmzkinetic.com），一个集策划、创作、排期和管理社交媒体内容于一体的 AI 助手。就像把你的文案团队放进了一个自动调酒师的肚子里，啥活儿都干！创始人和建设者们，真心求反馈啊，尤其是你们想知道这个东西能不能让你从键盘上稍微松一松手指，那我可就心满意足了！
